name: String Beans Almondine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash fresh beans and remove ends and strings.
2. Cover with boiling water to which 1/2 tsp. salt has been added. Cook uncovered for 20 to 30 minutes, or until tender. Drain and reserve 1/4 cup liquid.
3. Slice beans lengthwise into long, thin strips.
4. Melt margarine in saucepan.
5. Add almonds and sauté until edges are light brown. Remove with slotted spoon.
6. Add 1/4 cup liquid from beans and stir.
7. Add string beans and heat thoroughly, stirring occasionally.
8. Add oregano, almonds; salt and pepper to taste and mix lightly with fork until heated through.
